summary: Frontend-only verification of TaxLens YoY Dashboard section and Analysis Download PDF + Sources & Methodology. All requested features render and function correctly end-to-end via Playwright against the public preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: In YearOverYear.js the headline `effDiff > 0` tone uses red ('Up X pts'), but the small chevron icon at top-left flips between TrendingDown(emerald) and TrendingUp(amber). The amber-on-navy icon vs the red 'Up 0.6 pts vs 2023' caption is consistent but slightly mixed semantics; consider unifying tone (both amber/red) for clarity.
Analysis.handleDownload uses alert() on error — acceptable but a toast/inline error message would be more polished.
Dashboard load() doesn't catch errors (only `.finally`); a failed /returns request will leave returns=[] silently. Consider an error state.
seed_data_creation: None — used the existing TY2023 + TY2024 seeded returns for the test user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login at /login with [data-testid=login-email|login-password|login-submit]. Dashboard YoY testids: year-over-year, yoy-eff-shift, yoy-opportunity, yoy-new-opportunities, yoy-row-agi|taxable|tax|eff|opp, trend-chart. Analysis testids: download-pdf-button (GET /api/returns/{id}/pdf, blob, 200 application/pdf), sources-section, stat-agi|taxable|total-tax|effective, insight-card-*, scenario-simulator, sim-result. Scenario simulator sliders are 4 native input[type=range]; focus + ArrowRight key presses advance value. Verified TY2023 AGI=$94,000, TY2024 AGI=$104,600; Eff 14.0%→14.6% (+0.6 pts); TY2024 opportunity $6,450 across 4 insights; PDF download returns HTTP 200 with content-type application/pdf.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects discovered. All 5 requested feature checks (login, YoY section + numbers, trend chart, download PDF network response, sources-section, regression: stats/insight cards/simulator update) passed.
